title: 等公車話題
body:
Frances Cheng: ...
Frances Cheng: You sure you're okay? ;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_手擺後) >>
Frances Cheng: I still don't think this new job really suits you. ;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服2_正站右看) >>
Thought: I need a job right now. ;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_手擺後低頭) >>
Frances Cheng: Don't force yourself into it if you don't want to.
Thought: I can't stay unemployed at home. I need to take some pressure off her.
Frances Cheng: As a farm supervisor, I'm sure my salary is enough for the both of us.;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_手擺後低頭倒播) >>
Thought: But her family needs that money...
Frances Cheng: You should take the time to find something you like. ;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_手擺後左看) >>
<<#Simple(3)>>
->I want to be able to support you.
    Frances Cheng: You've always been supporting me.
    Frances Cheng: You made me realize that you'll always be there to support me.
    Frances Cheng: That's really important to me.
    Frances Cheng: Really.
    Thought: ...
->Easy for you to say.
    Frances Cheng: I...
    Frances Cheng: ...
    Frances Cheng: I didn't mean it like that.
    Frances Cheng: ...Sorry.
    Frances Cheng: I know you really want a job.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Frances Cheng: But...
Frances Cheng: What I want to say is: I'll still support you even if you don't have a job. ;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_左看牽手) >>
Frances Cheng: I don't want you to feel like you should get a job because of me.
Frances Cheng: I don't want to be a burden on you.
Frances Cheng: Jason, I'm serious. ;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服2_右看牽手) >>
<<#Simple(3)>>
->I know. ;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服2_右看牽手點頭) >>
    Frances Cheng: ...
->It's okay. You're not being a burden.
    Frances Cheng: ...Yeah. ;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服2_右看牽手點頭) >>
    Frances Cheng: Good!
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Frances Cheng: ...
Frances Cheng: The bus is so slow... ;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_左看牽手轉正) >>
Frances Cheng: Looks like City Hall must have spent their flop supplies on other districts.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服2_右看牽手轉正) >>
Frances Cheng: I guess we're all second-class citizens here in Yonghe District!
<<#Simple(4)>>
->Flop supplies?
->What does that have to do with the buses?
    Frances Cheng: Hm? ;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服2_右看牽手轉正倒播) >>
    Frances Cheng: Oh, see...;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_左看牽手轉正倒播) >>
    Frances Cheng: Right now, Wanpei's systems are <color=#88D8E3>controlled by AI</color>, right?
    Frances Cheng: Systems like public transportation, energy, communications, logistics and so on...
    Frances Cheng: Oh, and of course, surveillance.
    Frances Cheng: The algorithm and city-wide sensors automate a lot of the complicated work...;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_左看牽手轉正) >>
    Frances Cheng: But no matter how optimized the algorithm is, it still requires a <color=#E7D6A9>massive amount of computing power, or flops,</color> to handle the data coming in.
    Frances Cheng: So like right now, when it's rush hour, our flops will be allocated to the busier districts...
    Frances Cheng: When that happens, traffic efficiency here takes a hit.
    Frances Cheng: Okay! Do you get it now?;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_左看牽手轉正倒播) >>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Yep, I get it. ;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服2_右看牽手點頭) >>
        Frances Cheng: Good!
    ->I still don't get it.
        Frances Cheng: Basically, they're slowing down the buses here to help people commuting from Da'an District.
        Frances Cheng: I'll leave it at that. Hahaha.
        <<#Simple(3)>>
        ->Are you laughing at me?
            Frances Cheng: Nooooo...
            Frances Cheng: Okay, maybe a bit! ;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_左看牽手歪頭) >>
            Frances Cheng: That's what you get for making fun of my clumsy cooking.
            Frances Cheng: This is revenge!
        ->I see.
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Frances Cheng: ...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服2_右看牽手轉正) >>
Frances Cheng: Oh! The bus is here! ;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_左看牽手轉正) >>
<<#End>>
//以下空白----------------------------------
//以下空白----------------------------------
//以下空白----------------------------------
//以下空白----------------------------------

title: 主角停下來
body:
Frances Cheng: Hm?
Frances Cheng: Why are you just standing there?
Frances Cheng: I can wait if you have something to do.
<<#End>>

title: 主角小跑
body:
Frances Cheng: Hey, don't run! ;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服2_側站轉頭) >>
Frances Cheng: Can't we just walk there?
Frances Cheng: It's not like we're in a hurry! ;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服2_側站轉頭倒播) >>
<<#End>>

title: 鏡頭拉遠對話
body:
//一個鳴笛聲，一台巨大的貨船經過
Frances Cheng: That should be a <color=#88D8E3>Growell</color> cargo ship.
Frances Cheng: ...
Frances Cheng: ...
Frances Cheng: This city really makes you feel small and insignificant, doesn't it?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Yeah.
    Frances Cheng: ...That's why we have to work hard to be extraordinary.
->I don't think it does.
    Frances Cheng: Is that so...
    Frances Cheng: I guess... that's a good thing.
<<#EndSimple>>
Frances Cheng: Let's go. The bus is coming.
<<#End>>
//以下空白----------------------------------
//以下空白----------------------------------
//以下空白----------------------------------
//以下空白----------------------------------

title: Start
body:
Frances Cheng: Haah...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_便服2_正站右看) >> ;<< PlayUntil (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_正站伸懶腰) >>
Frances Cheng: Going to the farm doesn't feel like such a good idea now.
Thought: Frances doesn't need to escort me. She can stay at home...
Frances Cheng: What can I do? Gotta support the boyfriend!;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_正站右看) >>
<<#Simple(4)>>
->Maybe you should just stay at home
    Frances Cheng: Haha, I'm just joking!
    Frances Cheng: I promised I would go with you and I intend on keeping that promise! ;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_正站右看插腰) >>
    Frances Cheng: They need me to take care of a few things at the farm too...
    Frances Cheng: Ah... Life's hard...
    Frances Cheng: ...
    Frances Cheng: Still, we must do what must be done!
    <<#GoTo(@轉過身嚕嚕)>>
->Thanks.
    Frances Cheng: Well!
    Frances Cheng: You're being quite genuine today! ;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_正站右看插腰) >>
    Frances Cheng: I'd expect you to try and convince me to stay home.
    Frances Cheng: Instead of thinking about it all day...
    Frances Cheng: Doesn't it feel much better just to thank me from the get-go?
    Frances Cheng: At least I'd like you more this way.
    Thought: I...
    <<#GoTo(@轉過身嚕嚕)>>
<<#EndSimple>>
Frances Cheng: Haha, no, just kidding! I want to go with you. ;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_正站右看插腰) >>
Frances Cheng: Okay! Weather's good today!
Frances Cheng: A comfy night. We're in luck.
<<@轉過身嚕嚕>>
Frances Cheng: Okay, if we're all ready, let's go. ;<< Play(程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_正站右看插腰轉側)>>
<<#End>>
//以下空白
//以下空白
//以下空白
//以下空白

title: 叫住主角
body:
Frances Cheng: Wait! ;<<Play(程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站) >>
Frances Cheng: Did you hear that?
Frances Cheng: Look there. ;<<Play(程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側轉背) >>
Frances Cheng: It should be...
<<#End>>

title: 原地等太久
body:
Frances Cheng: Uh...
Frances Cheng: Hello?
Frances Cheng: Anyone home?
Frances Cheng: ...?
<<#End>>

title: 原地等太久2
body:
Frances Cheng: Hey! ;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站插腰) >>
Frances Cheng: Jason Dai!
Frances Cheng: You there?
Frances Cheng: Are you rebooting your system, or just broken?
Frances Cheng: Let's go already!
Frances Cheng: ...;<< Play (程芳, MBU_程芳_白袍_側站插腰倒播) >>
Frances Cheng: I'll just wait here. I guess we'll leave when you want to.
<<#End>>

title: 往反方向走
往反方向走2
body:
Frances Cheng: Are we going to go or what?
Frances Cheng: ...
Frances Cheng: I'm waiting...
<<#End>>
